news.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

news.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

news.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

news.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

news.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.

news.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

news.title: Stocks slip under weight of AI losses, rising oil costs
news.description: [ARKANSAS ONLINE] NEW YORK -- Oil prices jumped Monday following a weekend of attacks in the Middle East, while more losses for computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial intelligence boom dragged stock markets lower.

news.title: China's exports surge 27% in June on AI boom, trade surplus widens to $125.6 billion
news.description: [TIMES OF INDIA] International Business News: China's exports grew much faster than expected in June, rising 27% year-on-year, driven by booming demand for artificial intelligence (AI)-related pro.

news.title: Harsh Goenka's secret to being successful: Industralist explains why people fail despite having goals and what they need to avoid to acheive it
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] Industrialist Harsh Goenka highlighted vague goals as a major obstacle. He stated that specific objectives provide necessary direction for action. Users agreed that clear targets are fundamental for achieving desired outcomes. Many compared vague...

news.title: Greek Parliament Committee Advances AI Regulation Bill Amid Opposition Pushback
news.description: [IEFIMERIDA] A parliamentary committee has approved in principle Greece's bill implementing the European Union's Artificial Intelligence Regulation, with only the governing New Democracy party voting in favor, as opposition parties reserved final judgment for...

news.title: China's June exports surge 27% from a year earlier as AI boom drives strong demand
news.description: [THE ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION] China’s customs agency says its exports accelerated in June, jumping 27% from a year earlier, driven by strong demand due to the boom in artificial intelligence. The increase in exports in June was much better than economists had expected. Exports...

news.title: Irish artists are being ripped off by systems exploting their work to produce 'AI art'
news.description: [THE IRISH SUN] IT’s not just ordinary workers who are being made to fear for their future as artificial intelligence continues to develop and expand. But...

news.title: AI safety body to scan for ‘catastrophic’ threats
news.description: [AUSTRALIAN FINANCIAL REVIEW] The head of the new AI Safety Institute says it will prioritise protecting Australia from potential catastrophic harm posed by sophisticated artificial intelligence.

news.title: Oil prices extend run higher as fighting flares in the Middle East
news.description: [EURONEWS] Oil prices climbed early Tuesday as fighting intensified in the Middle East, while Asian shares declined, dragged lower by losses for artificial-intelligence stocks.

news.title: AI cameras now being used to assist Sacramento parking enforcement
news.description: [CBS NEWS] Drivers who stop or park in Sacramento bike lanes could now face a steeper fine as the city expands its use of artificial intelligence to enforce parking rules.

news.title: China's June exports surge 27% from a year earlier as AI boom drives strong demand
news.description: [EURONEWS] China’s exports accelerated in June, jumping 27% from a year earlier thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence, the customs agency said on Tuesday.
